name: Single A100 QAT Performance Fix
blurb: Enabled QAT directly within CastedLinear using straight-through estimators. Refactored the QAT clipping path in CastedLinear from torch.quantile to .amax(dim=1) to alleviate a 30x compiler performance penalty. Attached A100 run reaches step 1186 under the 10-minute training wallclock cap (train-time val_bpb 1.4078), and submission val_bpb reports the final post-export sliding-window roundtrip metric (1.52523).
author: Shuvam Banerji Seal
